tools.name: search_services
tools.title: Search services
tools.description: Search active seller services on Sarat by keyword, sorted by rating. Returns id, title, description, price, delivery_days, rating, and reviews_count.

query.description: Free-text search matched against service title and description.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 10.

quick_only.description: If true, only return quick (24h delivery) services.

tools.name: get_service
tools.title: Get service details
tools.description: Fetch a single Sarat service by id, including full description, features, gallery, price, delivery days, revisions, rating, and order count.

tools.name: list_open_projects
tools.title: List open buyer projects
tools.description: List buyer projects on Sarat that are open for freelancer proposals. Returns id, title, description, budget range, deadline_days, and required skills.

limit.description: Maximum number of projects to return. Defaults to 10.

skill.description: If set, only return projects whose required skills contain this value.
